title: ad-creative
purpose: Generate high-performing ad copy at scale — headlines, descriptions, and primary text with character-count validation, angle-based organization, and performance iteration.
when: When generating or iterating paid ad copy, creating headline and description variations, organizing copy by angles, or using performance data to inform the next creative round.

title: brand-bible
purpose: Write user-facing copy following brand voice guidelines with empathetic tone, concise style, active voice, and context-appropriate personality.
when: When writing error messages, settings pages, documentation, billing flows, onboarding text, loading states, or any user-facing copy that must follow brand voice.

title: brand-guidelines-anthropic
purpose: Apply Anthropic's official brand identity including colors, typography (Poppins/Lora with system fallbacks), and visual formatting to deliverables.
when: When creating Anthropic-branded materials, applying official colors and typography, or formatting deliverables with Anthropic visual identity.

title: brand-guidelines-community
purpose: Apply Anthropic's community brand identity including colors, typography, and visual formatting for community-facing materials.
when: When creating community-facing Anthropic materials, applying community brand colors and typography, or formatting community deliverables.

title: canvas-design
purpose: Create design philosophies as aesthetic movements and express them visually on canvas, producing .md philosophy documents and .pdf or .png art files using bundled fonts.
when: When creating posters, visual art, design philosophy documents, or any canvas-based visual design expressed as PDF or PNG.

title: design-md
purpose: Create DESIGN.md files as design system documentation for Stitch projects, translating technical design tokens into descriptive visual language.
when: When analyzing Stitch projects, creating DESIGN.md files, synthesizing semantic design systems, or generating design documentation for generative design tools.

title: design-orchestration
purpose: Control the flow between design skills ensuring ideas become designs, designs are reviewed, and only validated designs reach implementation.
when: When coordinating a multi-step design pipeline, routing between generation, review, and implementation skills, or ensuring design validation before handoff.

title: theme-factory
purpose: Apply consistent, professional theme styling (color palettes, font pairings, visual identity) to slide decks and artifacts from a library of 10 pre-built themes.
when: When styling slide decks, presentations, or artifacts with a cohesive theme, or when the user needs to choose from pre-built visual themes.

title: web-design-codex
purpose: Review web interface files for compliance with Vercel's Web Interface Guidelines, outputting findings in terse file:line format.
when: When reviewing web UI files for design guideline compliance, checking against Vercel's Web Interface Guidelines, or auditing frontend code for design consistency.
